channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lamar Jackson dazzles with 5 touchdown passes as Ravens take down injured-riddled Bucs
item.description: The Baltimore Ravens won 5 straight games after Lamar Jackson threw 5 touchdowns in the team's victory over the Tampa Bay Buccaneers on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cardinals beat Chargers after controversial penalty sets up game-winning field goal
item.description: The Arizona Cardinals kicked a game-winning field goal as time expired to beat the Los Angeles Chargers, but a controversial call that helped them get there has fans reeling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC to play St. Louis in inaugural home match at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: Major League Soccer unveiled the first match and home opener for San Diego FC on Monday as they approach their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers stay alive all the way to the World Series with bullpen games and contributions from all
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The World Series is always the goal for the big-spending Los Angeles Dodgers. It's been elusive recently, with first-round flops two years running. Now, with Shohei Ohtani leading the way for the first time, they are going for another championship.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WNBA players union decides to opt out of current collective bargaining agreement
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA players union has decided to opt out of the current collective bargaining agreement, two years before its expiration. The league and players union had the option to do so before Nov. 1. The early opt-out marks a crucial juncture for the league.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders QB Aidan O'Connell expected to be out 4-6 weeks with a broken thumb, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Aidan O'Connell is expected to be out four to six weeks with a broken thumb, a person close to the situation said Monday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the Raiders have not made an announcement.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg makes preseason AP All-America team as ACC, Big 12, SEC each place 2 players
item.description: Alabama's Mark Sears and North Carolina's RJ Davis looked into the possibility of leaving for the NBA before deciding to return for another college season. Their decisions helped their teams earn top-10 rankings in the AP Top 25 and earned both players some preseason honors, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deshaun Watson's season is ended by a ruptured Achilles tendon. Browns say QB will have surgery
item.description: Deshaun Watson won’t finish the season as Cleveland’s starting quarterback for the second straight year.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tiger Woods to make TGL indoor league debut the 2nd week of the season after NFL wild-card weekend
item.description: Tiger Woods makes his debut in the second week of the indoor TMRW Golf League, part of a schedule released Monday that has the six teams wrapping up the inaugural season on ESPN two weeks before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Woman runs onto Steelers' field with pro-Trump sign as former president attends game
item.description: With former President Donald Trump in attendance, a woman ran onto the field during Sunday night's Pittsburgh Steelers-New York Jets game with a pro-Trump sign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers fear Brandon Aiyuk suffering season-ending ACL tear in loss to Chiefs
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers are fearing star receivier Brandon Aiyuk has suffered a torn ACL after being carted off against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers for Week 8
item.description: Another week is in the books, and Fox News Digital gives you the college football winners and losers from an entertainment-filled Week 8.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: University of South Florida to support hurricane relief efforts during UAB football game
item.description: Fans who donate three or more shelf-stable items will receive a coupon for two complimentary tickets to a 2024 home football game of their choice.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Sports Network still unavailable for many fans, Blackhawks chairman unhappy about it, new report says
item.description: The Chicago Sports Network (CHSN) has debuted, but a lot of fans still can't watch the brand-new television home of the Bulls, Blackhawks and White Sox. And Blackhawks chairman Danny Wirtz is dissatisfied, according to a Sun-Times report this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov gets 4th goal of the season, Lightning beat Canucks 4-1 in Milton-delayed home opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored his fourth goal of the season, and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Vancouver Canucks in their hurricane-delayed home opener on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
